subcodes.title: Words spoken to Persian Baha'is at Hotel Victoria in Ramleh, 1912-03-04
subcodes.first_line: Among the holy Manifestations of God was Zoroaster, whose Prophethood is clear and evident as the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از جمله مظاهر مقدسه الهیه حضرت زردشت بود نبوت حضرت مثل آفتاب واضح و روشن است
subcodes.subjects: @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @oneness; unity of religion, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @unity in diversity
